parameters.errorMessage: HMAC verification failed — possible spam or key rotation needed. Rotate WEBHOOK_HMAC_SECRET on both Render and n8n.

assignments.name: submissionId
assignments.value: ={{ $('Website Contact Received').item.json.body.submission_id ? ($('Website Contact Received').item.json.body.submission_id.length > 10 ? $('Website Contact Received').item.json.body.submission_id.slice(0, 6) : $('Website Contact Received').item.json.body.submission_id) : Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO consultation_submissions (
    submission_id, created_at, full_name, email, phone,
    business_name, industry, pos_system, booking_software, accounting_tool,
    biggest_challenge, help_areas, urgency, budget_range,
    preferred_contact, referral_source, ip_address, turnstile_passed,
    status, language_flag, flagged_words,
    sentiment_priority, sentiment_category, sentiment_triggers, updated_at
) VALUES (
    '{{ $json.submissionId }}',
    '{{ $json.submittedAt.split(".")[0].replace("T", " ") }}',
    '{{ $json.senderName.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.senderEmail }}',
    '{{ $json.senderPhone }}',
    '{{ $json.senderCompany.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.senderIndustry }}',
    '{{ $json.toolsPOS }}',
    '{{ $json.toolsBooking }}',
    '{{ $json.toolsAccounting }}',
    '{{ $json.senderChallenge.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    '{{ $json.helpAreas }}',
    '{{ $json.senderUrgency }}',
    '{{ $json.senderBudget }}',
    '{{ $json.preferredContact }}',
    '{{ $json.referralSource }}',
    '{{ $json.ipHash }}',
    TRUE,
    'new',
    '{{ $json.languageFlag }}',
    '{{ $json.flaggedWords }}',
    '{{ $json.sentimentPriority }}',
    '{{ $json.sentimentCategory }}',
    '{{ $json.sentimentTriggers }}',
    NOW()
);

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "values": [
    [
      "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
      "{{ $('Profanity & Sentiment Check').item.json.submissionId }}",
      "{{ $('INSERT INTO MySQL').isError ? 'Error' : 'Success' }}",
      "{{ $('Append to Excel (OneDrive)').isError ? 'Error' : 'Success' }}",
      "{{ $('Resend → Notify Daniel').isError ? 'Error' : 'Sent' }}",
      "{{ $('Resend → Confirm to User').isError ? 'Error' : 'Sent' }}",
      "{{ $('Profanity & Sentiment Check').item.json.sentimentPriority }}",
      "{{ $('Profanity & Sentiment Check').item.json.languageFlag }}",
      "Processed {{ $('Profanity & Sentiment Check').item.json.senderName }} ({{ $('Profanity & Sentiment Check').item.json.senderCompany }})"
    ]
  ]
}
